title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-23538 Feast resource exhaustion via websocket endpoint
id: baad5115-acfc-566a-a723-cbbb4aaf28ab
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-23538 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23538
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/16
modified: 2026/07/16
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-23538 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-16T01:49:55Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-23538", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-23538 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1222782; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-16, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: ViewComponent: around_render HTML-Safety Bypass
description:
## Summary

`ViewComponent::Base#around_render` can return HTML-unsafe strings that bypass the escaping behavior applied to normal `#call` return values. This creates an XSS risk when downstream applications use `around_render` to wrap, replace, instrument, or conditionally return content that includes user-controlled data.

The issue is especially dangerous in collection rendering because `ViewComponent::Collection#render_in` joins the per-item results and marks the entire output as `html_safe`, converting raw unsafe output into a trusted `ActiveSupport::SafeBuffer`.


## Affected Code

Validated against:

- Repository commit: `eea79445`
- Ruby: `3.4.9`

Relevant locations:

- `lib/view_component/base.rb`
  - `render_in`
  - `around_render`
  - `__vc_maybe_escape_html`
- `lib/view_component/template.rb`
  - `InlineCall#safe_method_name_call`
- `lib/view_component/collection.rb`
  - `Collection#render_in`

Key code paths:

```ruby
# lib/view_component/base.rb
around_render do
  render_
